rationale: Codebase-pin lens, re-verified at 93143d92 against the CHANGED pins. (1) All four domain docs the beads now touch exist: .mindspec/domains/{workflow,execution,core,context-system}/architecture.md are all present at this SHA. (2) OWNERSHIP.yaml globs confirm every per-bead domain claim: internal/setup/** and cmd/** and plugins/mindspec/** and internal/{hook,next,doctor,validate,panel,layout,instruct} are workflow; internal/{gitutil,harness,safeio} execution; internal/{recording,phase} core; internal/contextpack context-system. So B1=all four, B2=workflow (safeio only called, not edited), B3=workflow+core, B4=workflow are all correct. (3) New go-test selectors resolve: internal/complete, internal/phase, cmd/mindspec all have Go files; TestRun_CompletePerfPairSubprocessBudget, TestFetchChildren, TestRunCodex_RefusesSymlinkedAGENTSmd are all net-new (absent now, correctly). Delegate/stub symbols exist (fetchChildren:213, GetChildren:124, FindActiveBeadForEpic:713, FindActiveBeadForEpicWithCache:720, SetListJSONForTest, queryAllChildren:884, stubChildrenByStatus:535). (4) Inverted-grep targets are real files with real occurrences: codex.go has os.WriteFile/OpenFile at 68/79/96; spec_init.go:33 has the duplicated spec.Run body, specCreateCmd.RunE correctly absent. The docsync gate the round-2 fix rests on is real (checkInternalPackages, isSourceFile, isDocFile, rootOperatorDocs, internal-docs error all in validate/docsync.go). No pin miss; approval holds.

findings.location: plan.md work_chunks key_file_paths + Bead steps 5/6/4 (domain docs)
findings.note: ADDRESSED. Every newly added domain-doc pin resolves at 93143d92: workflow/execution/core/context-system architecture.md all exist. Per-bead domain sets match the OWNERSHIP.yaml globs exactly (B1 four, B2 workflow-only since safeio is called not edited, B3 workflow+core, B4 workflow with AGENTS.md correctly excluded as a rootOperatorDoc). checkInternalPackages/isSourceFile/isDocFile/rootOperatorDocs are present in internal/validate/docsync.go, so the complete-time doc-sync gate the fix targets is a real, satisfiable gate.

findings.location: plan.md Bead 3/Bead 4 Verification (new go-test selectors + inverted greps)
findings.note: ADDRESSED. Package paths ./internal/complete/..., ./internal/phase/..., ./cmd/... all exist with Go sources. The three -run test names are net-new (absent at this SHA, as intended). Inverted greps target real files/occurrences: internal/setup/codex.go (os.WriteFile/OpenFile at 68,79,96), cmd/mindspec/spec_init.go (spec.Run duplicate body present, specCreateCmd.RunE not yet), and internal/cmd trees for FindActiveBeadForEpic.
